records.command: kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-src-bc604e exec deployment/source-arangodb -- sh -lc "rm -rf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && arangodump --server.endpoint tcp://127.0.0.1:8529 --server.authentication false --all-databases true --output-directory /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && tar -C /tmp -cf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump.tar pvc-migrator-dump"

kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-src-bc604e cp source-arangodb-$(kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-src-bc604e get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=source-arangodb -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}'):/tmp/pvc-migrator-dump.tar .pvc-migrator-runs/arangodb-source-arangodb.tar
records.description: Copy ArangoDB dump from source-arangodb to local artifact

records.command: kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-dst-bc604e cp .pvc-migrator-runs/arangodb-source-arangodb.tar dest-arangodb-$(kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-dst-bc604e get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dest-arangodb -o jsonpath='{.items[0].metadata.name}'):/tmp/pvc-migrator-dump.tar
records.description: Copy local ArangoDB dump artifact into dest-arangodb

records.command: kubectl --context kind-review-env-smoke -n vendor-flow-dst-bc604e exec deployment/dest-arangodb -- sh -lc "rm -rf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump && mkdir -p /tmp && tar -C /tmp -xf /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump.tar && arangorestore --server.endpoint tcp://127.0.0.1:8529 --server.authentication false --all-databases true --input-directory /tmp/pvc-migrator-dump --create-database true --overwrite true"

kubectl exec statefulset/source-vmstorage -c vmbackup -- sh -lc "rm -rf /vmbackup-data/latest /tmp/vmbackup-latest.tar && rm -f /vmbackup-data/vmbackup-latest.tar && /vmbackup-prod -storageDataPath=/vmstorage-data -snapshot.createURL=http://127.0.0.1:8482/snapshot/create -dst=fs:///vmbackup-data/latest && tar -C /vmbackup-data -cf /vmbackup-data/vmbackup-latest.tar latest"

records.description: Copy vmbackup artifact from source-vmstorage to local run artifacts

records.command: create helper pod with victoriametrics/vmrestore, mount destination PVC, copy .pvc-migrator-runs/source-vmstorage-vmbackup-latest.tar, extract it, and run /vmrestore-prod -src=fs:///tmp/vmbackup/latest -storageDataPath=/vmstorage-data
records.description: Restore backup into destination PVCs for dest-vmstorage

records.command: create helper pod with victoriametrics/vmrestore, mount destination PVC, copy .pvc-migrator-runs/source-vmstorage-vmbackup-latest.tar, extract it, and run /vmrestore-prod -src=fs:///tmp/vmbackup/latest -storageDataPath=/vmstorage-data#copy

create helper pod with victoriametrics/vmrestore, mount destination PVC, copy .pvc-migrator-runs/source-vmstorage-vmbackup-latest.tar, extract it, and run /vmrestore-prod -src=fs:///tmp/vmbackup/latest -storageDataPath=/vmstorage-data#restore

create helper pod with victoriametrics/vmrestore, mount destination PVC, copy .pvc-migrator-runs/source-vmstorage-vmbackup-latest.tar, extract it, and run /vmrestore-prod -src=fs:///tmp/vmbackup/latest -storageDataPath=/vmstorage-data#cleanup

records.description: Scale destination StatefulSet dest-vmstorage back to 1
